mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.production_order_id, p.production_order_no, p.order_item_id, p.product_serial_no, p.product_materiel, p.product_name, p.material_id, p.material_code, p.material_name, p.material_type, p.material_source, p.unit, p.bom_level, p.bom_path, p.gross_requirement, COALESCE(inv.available_stock, 0) AS available_stock, p.safety_stock, GREATEST(p.gross_requirement + p.safety_stock - COALESCE(inv.available_stock, 0), 0) AS net_requirement, p.requirement_date, p.lead_time_days, p.release_date, p.delivery_status, p.inbound_status, p.inbound_request_id, p.inbound_request_no, p.outbound_status, p.outbound_request_id, p.outbound_request_no, p.calc_batch_no, p.calc_time, p.remark, p.is_deleted, p.create_time, p.create_username, p.update_time, p.update_username FROM sp_material_requirement_plan p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT materiel_id, SUM(qty) AS available_stock FROM sp_inventory WHERE is_deleted = '0' AND stock_status = 'AVAILABLE' AND qty > 0 GROUP BY materiel_id ) inv ON inv.materiel_id = p.material_id WHERE ORDER BY (CASE WHEN p.delivery_status = 'WAIT' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ASC, p.requirement_date ASC, p.material_code ASC, p.update_time DESC

SELECT YEARWEEK(STR_TO_DATE(p.requirement_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), 1) AS weekKey, MIN(p.requirement_date) AS weekStartDate, MAX(p.requirement_date) AS weekEndDate, COUNT(1) AS lineCount, COUNT(DISTINCT p.production_order_id) AS orderCount, SUM(p.gross_requirement) AS grossRequirement, SUM(GREATEST(p.gross_requirement + p.safety_stock - COALESCE(inv.available_stock, 0), 0)) AS netRequirement, SUM(CASE WHEN p.delivery_status = 'WAIT' THEN GREATEST(p.gross_requirement + p.safety_stock - COALESCE(inv.available_stock, 0), 0) ELSE 0 END) AS waitReleaseQty, SUM(CASE WHEN p.delivery_status = 'RELEASED' THEN GREATEST(p.gross_requirement + p.safety_stock - COALESCE(inv.available_stock, 0), 0) ELSE 0 END) AS releasedQty, SUM(CASE WHEN p.inbound_status = 'GENERATED' THEN GREATEST(p.gross_requirement + p.safety_stock - COALESCE(inv.available_stock, 0), 0) ELSE 0 END) AS generatedInboundQty FROM sp_material_requirement_plan p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT materiel_id, SUM(qty) AS available_stock FROM sp_inventory WHERE is_deleted = '0' AND stock_status = 'AVAILABLE' AND qty > 0 GROUP BY materiel_id ) inv ON inv.materiel_id = p.material_id WHERE GROUP BY YEARWEEK(STR_TO_DATE(p.requirement_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), 1) ORDER BY weekKey ASC
